opportunities.title: [Hiring] A short-form video editor/storyteller. with big upside opportunity for the right candidate! $20-25
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] A short-form video editor/storyteller. with big upside opportunity for the right candidate! $20-25

I'm building a new lifestyle and mindset brand centered around a simple idea: How we show up matters. I'm looking for someone who can create realistic, relatable 15-30 second reels based on everyday moments. Examples: Stuck in traffic Spilled coffee Child not listening Long line at the store Someone having a bad day The goal is authenticity. Not motivational speeches. Not flashy edits. Not unrealistic AI stories. I'm looking for content that feels real, human, and relatable. Please PM e

[HIRING] TheStudentRoom.co.uk member for marketing

opportunities.title: Various Positions
opportunities.description:
Job Description

Government of Northwest Territories

BALANCE Life. EXPERIENCE Living.

Work with us!

The Government of Northwest Territories (GNWT) provides programs and services to more than 44,000 residents across 33 communities in the Northwest Territories. This requires a talented and diverse group of employees dedicated to, and representative of, the public we serve.

A career with the GNWT is an opportunity to make a difference while also enjoying a generous compensation package that includes salary, pension, annual leave
